summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Timetable and Events features. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed Timetable and Events pages work on desktop and mobile (375px). Admin dashboard Timetable and Events tabs are fully functional with CRUD operations.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing event data created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timetable and Events features fully tested and working. Backend API tests cover: GET /api/timetable, PUT /api/admin/timetable, GET /api/events, GET /api/admin/events, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/events. Frontend tested on desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px). Image uploads use base64 encoding stored in MongoDB. Admin authentication uses JWT tokens.

events_api.GET /api/admin/events: PASS - Returns all events with auth
events_api.POST /api/admin/events: PASS - Creates new event with auth

public_pages./events: PASS - Displays event cards with images

admin_dashboard.events_tab: PASS - Create, read, update, delete, toggle

mobile_responsive.375px_viewport: PASS - All tabs and forms accessible
